messages.subject: Project Alpha — Build Pipeline Failure (URGENT)
messages.body:
Hi team,

I've just noticed that the Project Alpha CI/CD pipeline has been failing since approximately 08:30 this morning. The nightly build job is throwing a NullPointerException in the DataIngestionService during the integration test phase.

Error summary:
  java.lang.NullPointerException at DataIngestionService.processRecord(DataIngestionService.java:142)
  Caused by: missing configuration key 'aibook.qdrant.collection' in the test profile.

I've checked the test/application-test.yml and the property is absent. This was likely removed in the refactoring PR #347 that was merged yesterday.

Immediate actions needed:
  1. Add the missing property back to application-test.yml
  2. Re-run the failing integration tests
  3. Notify the release manager if we can't fix this before the 16:00 code-freeze

Please let me know if anyone is already working on this.

Sarah

messages.subject: RE: Project Alpha — Build Pipeline Failure (URGENT)
messages.body:
Hi Sarah,

I can confirm — I was the one who merged PR #347. The property removal was intentional for the Qdrant refactor, but I missed updating the test profile. My apologies for the disruption.

I've already pushed a fix in PR #351:
  - Re-added 'aibook.qdrant.collection=test-documents' to application-test.yml
  - Added a validation assertion in QdrantConfigTest to prevent future regressions
  - Ran the integration suite locally and all 47 tests are passing

The PR is up for review. Given the urgency I've tagged Priya as reviewer. Once approved, I'll merge immediately and trigger a manual pipeline run.

Estimated fix time: 45–60 minutes from now, well before the 16:00 code-freeze.

Mike

messages.subject: RE: Project Alpha — Build Pipeline Failure (URGENT)
messages.body:
Team,

I've reviewed and approved PR #351. The fix looks correct and the test coverage addition is exactly what we need to prevent this class of regression.

I've merged the PR and triggered the pipeline manually — it's currently running. Pipeline URL: https://ci.techcorp.com/jobs/project-alpha/build/1247

Additional notes from my review:
  - I noticed two other test profiles (staging, perf) may also be missing this property. I've opened a follow-up ticket (TECH-4892) to audit all profiles before the next sprint.
  - The DataIngestionService could be made more robust by providing a default value for the collection name — I'll raise that in the next architecture review.

The release manager has been notified and the code-freeze is on track.

Priya

On 2026-03-01 11:03, Mike Okonkwo wrote:
> I've already pushed a fix in PR #351...
